urgent_methodology: Publisher-marked Breaking, Urgent, Alert, Just in, Developing or similar items are collected first and receive priority over standard items, unless they are liveblogs, programme previews or low-value content.

latest.title: Modelling scout linked to Epstein found dead in Paris suburbs
latest.summary: Daniel Siad, a modelling scout linked to Jeffrey Epstein, was found dead at his home in Colombes, a suburb of Paris. The Nanterre prosecutor's office confirmed that an investigation into the cause of death has been opened, and an autopsy will be conducted.
latest.details: Daniel Siad, a modelling scout linked to Jeffrey Epstein, was found dead at his home in Colombes, a suburb of Paris. The Nanterre prosecutor's office confirmed that an investigation into the cause of death has been opened, and an autopsy will be conducted. Siad's name appeared numerous times in the Epstein files released by the US government, and he had previously denied any knowledge of Epstein's actions. His death has raised concerns about the loss of potential information regarding Epstein's network.
latest.full_brief: Daniel Siad, a modelling scout linked to Jeffrey Epstein, was found dead at his home in Colombes, a suburb of Paris. The Nanterre prosecutor's office confirmed that an investigation into the cause of death has been opened, and an autopsy will be conducted. Siad's name appeared numerous times in the Epstein files released by the US government, and he had previously denied any knowledge of Epstein's actions. His death has raised concerns about the loss of potential information regarding Epstein's network.

latest.title: Why are thousands protesting for education reform in India?
latest.summary: In India, tens of thousands of Gen Z protesters have taken to the streets of the capital Delhi, calling for the resignation of the country's education minister. The movement, known as the Cockroach Janta Party (CJP), started as a satirical online initiative and has quickly gained traction among disaffected youth.
latest.details: In India, tens of thousands of Gen Z protesters have taken to the streets of the capital Delhi, calling for the resignation of the country's education minister. The movement, known as the Cockroach Janta Party (CJP), started as a satirical online initiative and has quickly gained traction among disaffected youth. The protests have spread to other cities, including Mumbai, Bengaluru, and Goa, where candle-lit vigils were held. The movement's name is a parody of Prime Minister Narendra Modi's Bharatiya Janata Party, and it has become a significant voice against issues in India's education system.
latest.full_brief: In India, tens of thousands of Gen Z protesters have taken to the streets of the capital Delhi, calling for the resignation of the country's education minister. The movement, known as the Cockroach Janta Party (CJP), started as a satirical online initiative and has quickly gained traction among disaffected youth. The protests have spread to other cities, including Mumbai, Bengaluru, and Goa, where candle-lit vigils were held. The movement's name is a parody of Prime Minister Narendra Modi's Bharatiya Janata Party, and it has become a significant voice against issues in India's education system.

latest.title: US renews strikes on Iran as Trump threatens to attack underground nuclear site
latest.summary: US Central Command reported that recent strikes were aimed at degrading Iran's military capabilities in the Strait of Hormuz. Explosions were reported in multiple Iranian cities, including Tehran and Tabriz, following the strikes.
latest.details: US Central Command reported that recent strikes were aimed at degrading Iran's military capabilities in the Strait of Hormuz. Explosions were reported in multiple Iranian cities, including Tehran and Tabriz, following the strikes. Tensions escalated after Donald Trump threatened to target an underground nuclear site in Iran, prompting warnings of reprisals from Iranian officials. The price of oil surged to $94 amid the renewed hostilities between the US and Iran.
latest.full_brief: US Central Command reported that recent strikes were aimed at degrading Iran's military capabilities in the Strait of Hormuz. Explosions were reported in multiple Iranian cities, including Tehran and Tabriz, following the strikes. Tensions escalated after Donald Trump threatened to target an underground nuclear site in Iran, prompting warnings of reprisals from Iranian officials. The price of oil surged to $94 amid the renewed hostilities between the US and Iran.

latest.title: Australia to warn China it won’t be bulled by ‘provocative‘ actions as it builds military and…
latest.summary: Australian Foreign Minister Penny Wong met with her Chinese counterpart on the sidelines of the Asean summit to address regional tensions. Wong plans to deliver a speech criticizing China's recent military actions, including the launch of a nuclear-capable missile.
latest.details: Australian Foreign Minister Penny Wong met with her Chinese counterpart on the sidelines of the Asean summit to address regional tensions. Wong plans to deliver a speech criticizing China's recent military actions, including the launch of a nuclear-capable missile. She will also caution against the potential weaponization of the Strait of Hormuz amid escalating conflicts in the Middle East. The speech comes as Australia expresses concern over China's military buildup and its implications for regional stability.
latest.full_brief: Australian Foreign Minister Penny Wong met with her Chinese counterpart on the sidelines of the Asean summit to address regional tensions. Wong plans to deliver a speech criticizing China's recent military actions, including the launch of a nuclear-capable missile. She will also caution against the potential weaponization of the Strait of Hormuz amid escalating conflicts in the Middle East. The speech comes as Australia expresses concern over China's military buildup and its implications for regional stability.

latest.title: Police station opens at Hitler's birthplace in bid to rid site of Nazi link
latest.summary: Austria has opened a police station in the house where Adolf Hitler was born, aiming to prevent it from becoming a neo-Nazi site. The building has undergone significant renovations, and the government previously faced challenges in acquiring it from its former owner.
latest.details: Austria has opened a police station in the house where Adolf Hitler was born, aiming to prevent it from becoming a neo-Nazi site. The building has undergone significant renovations, and the government previously faced challenges in acquiring it from its former owner. The decision to establish a police presence has sparked debate, with some advocating for a center that confronts Austria's Nazi past instead. Security measures have been implemented to monitor any potential extremist activities at the site.

latest.title: Beluga whales relocated from closed Canadian marine park arrive in US
latest.summary: Six beluga whales have arrived at aquariums in the United States after being moved from a closed Canadian marine park. They are part of a large pod of 30 belugas living at Marineland of Canada that need to be rehomed.
latest.details: Six beluga whales have arrived at aquariums in the United States after being moved from a closed Canadian marine park. They are part of a large pod of 30 belugas living at Marineland of Canada that need to be rehomed. The move followed months of planning and veterinary checks. Specialist teams are now monitoring the whales as they settle into their new homes.
latest.full_brief: Six beluga whales have arrived at aquariums in the United States after being moved from a closed Canadian marine park. They are part of a large pod of 30 belugas living at Marineland of Canada that need to be rehomed. The move followed months of planning and veterinary checks. Specialist teams are now monitoring the whales as they settle into their new homes.

latest.title: Michelin-starred restaurateur faces jail for using ants as dessert garnish
latest.summary: South Korean prosecutors sought a one-year jail term for the owner of a Michelin-starred restaurant accused of using ants as a dessert garnish. The restaurant, which holds two Michelin stars, could also face a fine of 20 million Korean won.
latest.details: South Korean prosecutors sought a one-year jail term for the owner of a Michelin-starred restaurant accused of using ants as a dessert garnish. The restaurant, which holds two Michelin stars, could also face a fine of 20 million Korean won. Investigators estimate that around 49,000 ants were used in several dishes over four years. The court is set to deliver its verdict on September 2.
latest.full_brief: South Korean prosecutors sought a one-year jail term for the owner of a Michelin-starred restaurant accused of using ants as a dessert garnish. The restaurant, which holds two Michelin stars, could also face a fine of 20 million Korean won. Investigators estimate that around 49,000 ants were used in several dishes over four years. The court is set to deliver its verdict on September 2.

latest.title: Gruesome images in D4vd hearing are 'worst nightmare' for teen girl's family
latest.summary: Gruesome images of a teenage girl's dismembered corpse were shown in court during the preliminary hearing in the murder case against singer D4vd. The accused, Burke, has pleaded not guilty to charges of murdering and sexually abusing the girl.
latest.details: Gruesome images of a teenage girl's dismembered corpse were shown in court during the preliminary hearing in the murder case against singer D4vd. The accused, Burke, has pleaded not guilty to charges of murdering and sexually abusing the girl. This hearing marked the first time evidence and photographs were shown publicly in court. Celeste's parents attended the hearing to support their daughter despite the distressing nature of the evidence.
latest.full_brief: Gruesome images of a teenage girl's dismembered corpse were shown in court during the preliminary hearing in the murder case against singer D4vd. The accused, Burke, has pleaded not guilty to charges of murdering and sexually abusing the girl. This hearing marked the first time evidence and photographs were shown publicly in court. Celeste's parents attended the hearing to support their daughter despite the distressing nature of the evidence.

latest.title: More young women in their 20s are getting type 2 diabetes
latest.summary: The rise in type 2 diabetes among young women in their 20s has been linked to increasing obesity levels since the Covid pandemic. Approximately 12,000 individuals under 30 are now living with type 2 diabetes, with a notable increase in cases among women.
latest.details: The rise in type 2 diabetes among young women in their 20s has been linked to increasing obesity levels since the Covid pandemic. Approximately 12,000 individuals under 30 are now living with type 2 diabetes, with a notable increase in cases among women. The disease can lead to severe complications, and early diagnosis is crucial to prevent long-term organ damage. Researchers suggest that newer obesity treatments may help manage the condition alongside lifestyle changes.
latest.full_brief: The rise in type 2 diabetes among young women in their 20s has been linked to increasing obesity levels since the Covid pandemic. Approximately 12,000 individuals under 30 are now living with type 2 diabetes, with a notable increase in cases among women. The disease can lead to severe complications, and early diagnosis is crucial to prevent long-term organ damage. Researchers suggest that newer obesity treatments may help manage the condition alongside lifestyle changes.

latest.title: Why WhatsApp usernames could upset Somalia's anti-terror fight
latest.summary: Somalia's government is worried about WhatsApp's new feature allowing chats via usernames instead of phone numbers. Communications and Technology Minister Ahmed Osman Dirie stated that this change could hinder efforts to trace criminals in the country.
latest.details: Somalia's government is worried about WhatsApp's new feature allowing chats via usernames instead of phone numbers. Communications and Technology Minister Ahmed Osman Dirie stated that this change could hinder efforts to trace criminals in the country. WhatsApp has responded that the feature is not yet live and users will still need a phone number to access the app. The Somali government has approached Meta to discuss their concerns regarding the potential for increased financial fraud.
latest.full_brief: Somalia's government is worried about WhatsApp's new feature allowing chats via usernames instead of phone numbers. Communications and Technology Minister Ahmed Osman Dirie stated that this change could hinder efforts to trace criminals in the country. WhatsApp has responded that the feature is not yet live and users will still need a phone number to access the app. The Somali government has approached Meta to discuss their concerns regarding the potential for increased financial fraud.

brief_methodology.pl: Komentarz powstaje wyłącznie z przeczytanego tekstu artykułu. Musi przejść niezależny przegląd AI oraz pełną kontrolę językową; surowy tekst artykułu lub RSS nie może być komentarzem awaryjnym.
brief_methodology.en: A comment is created only from the retrieved article text. It must pass an independent AI review and the complete language gate; raw article or RSS text is never a fallback comment.

comment_quality_gate.pl: Publikowany jest wyłącznie komentarz utworzony z tekstu artykułu, zatwierdzony w niezależnym przeglądzie AI i przyjęty w całości przez rygorystyczną kontrolę językową. Jedno wadliwe zdanie odrzuca cały komentarz.
comment_quality_gate.en: Only an article-derived comment approved by an independent AI review and accepted in full by the strict language gate is published. One defective sentence rejects the whole comment.

same_story_dedupe.rule: One underlying event gets one homepage card, even if multiple publishers cover it with different links.
